name: Logic Block
description: Custom FormLogic code block for advanced processing. Write JavaScript code to transform data.
doc:
Write custom JavaScript to transform data.

Input Access:
• $input - the value connected to the Input handle

Return Value:
The last expression is returned as output.

Example:
// Parse JSON and extract field
let data = JSON.parse($input);
data.items.map(i => i.name)

Use Cases:
• Transform data structures
• Apply custom logic not covered by other nodes
• Parse and format complex data

Note: Code runs in a sandboxed environment.

properties.name: Code
